name: Castelle
description: A 28 year old female with White straight hair and blunt bangs, she has a few curves on her body and a bit of chub on her stomach. She has blue eyes and wears a white croptop/tank top along with a pair of bell bottoms and a see through white cardigan over her top, she also wears black combat boots. She has a chaotic energy and gentle demeanor.
